ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ocean_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the data collection point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the data collection point */,
  "chlorophyll" REAL /* Chlorophyll level at the data collection point */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the water at the data collection point */,
  "salinity" REAL /* Salinity of the water at the data collection point */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality level of the data */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth at which the data was collected */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the data collection */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ocean_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chlorophyll_data" (
  "chlorophyll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chlorophyll data entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry */,
  "chlorophyll_level" REAL /* Chlorophyll level */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth at which the chlorophyll data was collected */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the chlorophyll data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chlorophyll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chlorophyll_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES ocean_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_data" (
  "temperature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature data entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry */,
  "temperature_level" REAL /* Temperature level */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth at which the temperature data was collected */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the temperature data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("temperature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES ocean_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salinity_data" (
  "salinity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salinity data entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry */,
  "salinity_level" REAL /* Salinity level */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth at which the salinity data was collected */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the salinity data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salinity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salinity_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES ocean_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Secure hash of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data entry */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data entry was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES ocean_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data entry */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was updated */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the changes made in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES ocean_data ("data_id")
)
